parameters.emailMessage/Body:
Out of Office Request Approved

Approved by: @{variables('varManagerEmail')} on @{outputs('Update_item_Approved')?['body/Modified']}

Request Details:
@{triggerOutputs()?['body/Title']}

Type of Leave:
@{triggerOutputs()?['body/LeaveType/Value']}

Leave Period:
@{triggerOutputs()?['body/StartDate']} to @{triggerOutputs()?['body/EndDate']}

equals: Half Day or Partial Day Off

overtime_and_carryover_are_not_negative.description: there is a pre-approval auto reject case for if request IsNextYear, AND # of Days in request exceed Staff's CarryOver+Overtime

parameters.emailMessage/Subject: Next Year Out of Office Request @{triggerOutputs()?['body/ID']} by @{outputs('get_request_to_check_if_approve_has_been_processed')?['body/SubmittedTest/DisplayName']}
parameters.emailMessage/Body:
Request #@{triggerOutputs()?['body/ID']} Type @{triggerOutputs()?['body/LeaveType/Value']} for next year was approved. Your Make Up and Carry Over balances were deducted for this request. Please review your updated balances below:

Vacation: @{outputs('Get_item_2')?['body/CurrentVacationBalance']}
Sick Day: @{outputs('Get_item_2')?['body/CurrentSickDayBalance']}
Carry Over: @{outputs('Get_item_2')?['body/CarryOver']}
Time Make-Up: @{outputs('Get_item_2')?['body/CurrentOvertimeBalance']}

System has identified that this request was approved by@{outputs('Get_item')?['body/SupervisorLink/DisplayName']} despite it resulting in a negative Vacation balance for @{outputs('Get_item')?['body/Title']}.

Updated Balances for (@{outputs('Get_item')?['body/Title']})

Vacation: @{outputs('Get_item')?['body/CurrentVacationBalance']}
Sick Day: @{outputs('Get_item')?['body/CurrentSickDayBalance']}
Carry Over: @{outputs('Get_item')?['body/CarryOver']}
Time Make-Up: @{outputs('Get_item')?['body/CurrentOvertimeBalance']}

Updated Balances for (@{outputs('Get_item')?['body/Title']})

Vacation: @{outputs('Get_item')?['body/CurrentVacationBalance']}
Sick Day: @{outputs('Get_item')?['body/CurrentSickDayBalance']}
Carry Over: @{outputs('Get_item')?['body/CarryOver']}
Time Make-Up: @{outputs('Get_item')?['body/CurrentOvertimeBalance']}

Random_Delay_before_System_Ready_Check.description: random delay, so that if due to network issues that cause multiple requests for the same employee to be perceived as approved at the exact same time, both requests would check for System Ready Check at different times.

parameters.emailMessage/Body:
Out of Office Request Rejected

Rejected by: @{variables('varManagerEmail')} on @{outputs('Update_item_Rejected')?['body/Modified']}

Request Details:
@{triggerOutputs()?['body/Title']}

Type of Leave:
@{triggerOutputs()?['body/LeaveType/Value']}

Leave Period:
@{triggerOutputs()?['body/StartDate']} to @{triggerOutputs()?['body/EndDate']}

parameters.sendMessageRequest/body:
**Automated message from UCSH Bulletin Board**

A @{triggerOutputs()?['body/LeaveType/Value']} request has been submitted by @{triggerOutputs()?['body/SubmittedTest/DisplayName']}.

Out of Office Request Details:
@{triggerOutputs()?['body/StartDate']} to @{triggerOutputs()?['body/EndDate']}
@{triggerOutputs()?['body/Days']} Days

Description: @{triggerOutputs()?['body/Title']}

Current Balances:
@{variables('varCurrentVacationBalance')} Vacation
@{variables('varCurrentSickDayBalance')} Sick/Personal
@{variables('varCarryOverBalance')} Carry Over
@{variables('varOvertimeBalance')} Time Make-Up

To approve reply:
"Approve @{triggerOutputs()?['body/ID']}"
To reject reply:
"Reject @{triggerOutputs()?['body/ID']}"

parameters.optionsEmailSubscription/Message/Body:
Leave Request Details

Leave requested by:
@{triggerOutputs()?['body/SubmittedTest/DisplayName']}

Leave Period:
@{triggerOutputs()?['body/StartDate']} To @{triggerOutputs()?['body/EndDate']}
For @{triggerOutputs()?['body/Days']} Days

Type of Leave: @{triggerOutputs()?['body/LeaveType/Value']}

Leave Request Description:
@{triggerOutputs()?['body/Title']}

@{triggerOutputs()?['body/SubmittedTest/DisplayName']} Current Balances

  • Vacation: @{variables('varCurrentVacationBalance')} Days
  • Sick Days: @{variables('varCurrentSickDayBalance')} Days
  • Carry Over: @{variables('varCarryOverBalance')} Days
  • Time Make-Up: @{variables('varOvertimeBalance')} Days

parameters.emailMessage/Body:
Leave Request #@{triggerOutputs()?['body/ID']} has been rejected by the balancing system.

Reason:

Request is for the next calendar year, but is not of type: Vacation

parameters.item/Title: @{triggerOutputs()?['body/Title']} /// Auto-rejected: request is NextYear and is not of type Vacation.

parameters.emailMessage/Subject: Next Year Vacation Request @{triggerOutputs()?['body/ID']} - Auto Rejected
parameters.emailMessage/Body:
Please note that you do not have sufficient Carry Over and/or Make-Up time to cover this request and therefore it has been rejected by the system.

If there has been any error, please contact HR.

parameters.item/Title: @{triggerOutputs()?['body/Title']} /// Auto-rejected: insufficient balances for NextYear type request.

ensure_that_employee_can_afford_the_Next.description: total number of days in request must not exceed employee's total CarryOver + Overtime balance.

parameters.emailMessage/Subject: System triggered auto-reject: End-date exceeds user's allowed request date limit
parameters.emailMessage/Body:
Request #@{triggerBody()?['ID']} has been auto rejected due to request allowed date limit.


Details:

@{triggerBody()?['StartDate']} to @{triggerBody()?['EndDate']}

@{triggerBody()?['SubmittedTest/DisplayName']}'s current limit date: @{variables('Request Allow Date')}


Vacation Policy Update
Current Vacation Balance can only be used for vacations taken in the current year (2025).


Carry Over Balance can be used to book 2026 vacations, but only for dates between January and March 2026.


You must use up your 2025 vacation balance before transferring your vacation to carryover:


If you still have 2025 Vacation Balance left, the system will not let you use Carry Over for January–March 2026 requests.



If you transfer your 2025 balance to Carry Over and then request more 2025 vacations, those requests will deduct from your Carry Over instead.
